$comment: Lineage and changes applied on top of the upstream curation. Future syncs should re-apply these on top of refreshed upstream content.

changes.detail: Renamed skill to `clean-code-ts`; rewrote `description` to trigger on TypeScript projects (tsconfig.json, .ts/.tsx) instead of the generic 'codebase architecture' wording.

Added a `## TypeScript focus` section enumerating TS idioms the skill should prefer (discriminated unions, branded types, `unknown` over `any`, `Readonly<T>`, string unions over `enum`, TS `interface` for ports).

Added TypeScript-specific friction signals to the Explore step (pervasive `any`, runtime guards re-validating the same shape, large optional-field option objects, class hierarchies where a discriminated union would fit).

Added `## TypeScript idioms for designing interfaces` with worked examples for discriminated unions, branded types, `unknown` at boundaries, option-object signatures, ports as TS `interface`, avoiding `enum`, readonly-by-default.

Annotated each dependency category (1â€“4) with a `TypeScript flavour` paragraph: pure functions + Readonly for in-process, structural typing for local-substitutable, TS interface as port for remote-owned, narrow port over vendor SDK for true external.
Added `expectTypeOf` / `assertType` note to the testing strategy section â€” TS return types are part of the contract.
Added `## TypeScript naming conventions` section (vacuous nouns to avoid, verbs vs nouns, earned suffixes like Repository/Gateway/Policy, case conventions).
Extended `## Rejected framings` with TS-specific rejections (`enum` over string unions, `any` instead of `unknown`).

Removed cross-links to other forge-mattpocock skills (`../grill-with-docs/GLOSSARY-FORMAT.md`, `../grill-with-docs/ADR-FORMAT.md`) since this plugin ships only the architecture skill. Behaviour preserved as inline guidance.
